_about: Glossary category (Glossary, GlossarySearch). Requires the Management.Glossary RACI claim.

GET /api/v1/glossary.description: Returns paged glossary terms along with a total count. Filter by active state, creator, tag, category, and search text. When `GlossaryAccess.FilterTermsByOwnership` is on, the result is restricted to terms the caller owns or has been granted access to.

parameters.filterActive: When set, restrict to active or inactive terms.
parameters.id: When supplied with `version`, returns a specific term version (`GET /api/v1/glossary?id=...&version=...`).

POST /api/v1/glossary.description: Creates a new glossary term from the supplied model. Returns 409 Conflict if a term with the same name already exists, 400 with validation details when the model is invalid or the term has no condition.

PUT /api/v1/glossary.description: Updates an existing glossary term. Returns 409 Conflict on name collisions, 400 with validation details when the model or filter rules fail validation, and re-reads the term after update so the response contains the latest state. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for glossary term updates.

GET /api/v1/glossary/{id}.description: Returns a single glossary term by id, scoped to the calling user.

DELETE /api/v1/glossary/{id}.description: Deletes a glossary term. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for glossary term deletion.

parameters.take: Page size. Defaults to int.MaxValue (returns all).

POST /api/v1/glossary/category.description: Creates a new glossary category from the supplied model. Returns 409 Conflict when a category with the same name already exists.

PUT /api/v1/glossary/category.description: Updates an existing glossary category. Returns 409 Conflict on name collisions. The response includes the refreshed category.

GET /api/v1/glossary/category/{id}.description: Returns a single glossary category by id. Returns 404 if the category cannot be found.

DELETE /api/v1/glossary/category/{id}.description: Deletes a glossary category. The action goes through the RACI approval pipeline for glossary category deletion.

GET /api/v1/glossary/category/search/{na.description: Returns glossary categories whose name matches the supplied value. Returns 404 if nothing matches.

GET /api/v1/glossary/term/search/{name}.description: Returns glossary terms whose name matches the supplied value. Returns 404 if nothing matches.

POST /api/v1/glossary/termlexicon.description: Adds a lexicon entry (synonym, alias) to a glossary term. Returns 409 Conflict when a lexicon entry with the same name already exists.

DELETE /api/v1/glossary/lexicon/{id}.description: Deletes a glossary term lexicon entry.

POST /api/v1/glossary/tag.description: Creates a new glossary tag. Returns 409 Conflict when a tag with the same name already exists.

POST /api/v1/glossary/endorsement.description: Adds an endorsement on a glossary term. Endorsement is not restricted by RACI level — any authenticated user can endorse.

DELETE /api/v1/glossary/endorsement.description: Removes the caller's endorsement from a glossary term.

POST /api/v1/glossary/rating.description: Adds a rating for a glossary term. Open to any authenticated user.

PUT /api/v1/glossary/rating.description: Updates an existing rating for a glossary term.

POST /api/v1/glossary/import.description: Imports glossary terms from one or more uploaded CSV files (file size capped at 10 MB per file). The body must be a multipart upload containing `.csv` files.

GET /api/v1/glossary/reference.summary: List terms that reference a term
GET /api/v1/glossary/reference.description: Returns paged glossary terms that reference the supplied term — terms whose rules or text mention it.

POST /api/v1/glossary/clean.summary: Create clean project from glossary term
POST /api/v1/glossary/clean.description: Creates a clean project seeded from the supplied glossary term — useful to remediate the records the term currently matches.

parameters.take: Maximum number of records to seed the clean project with.

POST /api/v1/glossary/stream.description: Creates a stream seeded from the supplied glossary term. Returns 404 if the term cannot be found. (The implementation is partial — the stream creation step is currently a TODO and may be a no-op in some builds.)

GET /api/v1/glossary/dependencies/{id}.description: Returns the dependencies of a glossary term — other glossary artifacts (terms, lexicons, tags, rules) that reference it.

GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/entities.summary: List entities matched by a glossary term
GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/entities.description: Returns paged entities that match a glossary term's rule set. Response is cached for 360 seconds.

parameters.skip: Number of results to skip. Defaults to 0.

GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/metrics.description: Returns completeness statistics across the organisation's glossary — for example coverage and adoption metrics surfaced in the Governance Cockpit. Response is cached for 360 seconds.

GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/lineage.description: Returns a glossary term together with its lexicon and tags, used by the lineage view in the UI. Returns 404 if the term cannot be found. Response is cached for 360 seconds.

GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/analytics.description: Returns analytics-oriented metadata for a glossary term (lexicon, tags, and the term itself). Returns 404 if the term cannot be found. Response is cached for 360 seconds.

GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/pii.summary: Get PII details for a glossary term
GET /api/v1/glossarysearch/pii.description: Returns personally-identifiable-information details (counts of sensitive classifications) associated with the entities a glossary term currently matches. Response is cached for 360 seconds.
